title: Thermo UltiMate + Q Exactive: HILIC metabolomics LC-MS (kit)
description: Paired HILIC gradient and Q Exactive MS setup for small-molecule metabolomics LC-MS (Thermo app note 656). Instantiates both leaf methods together.

payload.description: A combination kit that bundles the matching LC gradient and MS setup for HILIC small-molecule metabolomics LC-MS on a Thermo UltiMate feeding a Q Exactive Orbitrap. Sample flows LC then MS: component 0 is the HILIC metabolomics gradient, component 1 is the Full MS plus ddMS2 acquisition setup. Each component keeps its own source provenance. Representative starting-point methods, verify against the source and tune per instrument and sample.
